name: AlertingRulesEngine

neutralConcepts: Alert rules loaded from FREEDOM config key 'data_warehouse_alerting_rules' — never hardcoded
Alert evaluation is tenant-scoped — each tenant evaluates against their own rules only
tenantId must be included in every alert emission

ironRules.rule: Alert rules MUST come from FREEDOM config key 'data_warehouse_alerting_rules' — never a hardcoded array or constant.
Alert evaluation is tenant-scoped — each tenant evaluates only their own alert rules. Cross-tenant rule evaluation is forbidden.
tenantId must be present in every alert emission CloudEvent.

keywords: alerting rules engine FREEDOM config tenant-scoped evaluation KPI snapshot alert emission tenantId warehouse analytics
